arts.ttl: Tottenham reaches Europa League semifinals while Man United goes to extra time with Lyon
arts.sum: Manchester United blew a two-goal lead at home to Lyon to draw 2-2 and 4-4 on aggregate, sending the game into extra time at Old Trafford. The win keeps alive Spurs’ hopes of salvaging a desperate campaign that has left them languishing in 15th place in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro tackles with his HEAD as Man United star channels his inner Phil Jones and John Terry - leaving Rio Ferdinand in awe of his bravery
arts.sum: Man United defender Leny Yoro put his body on the line during his side's Europa League quarter-final second leg clash against Lyon.

arts.ttl: Man United receive clear red card verdict after Europa League controversy
arts.sum: Manchester United have been handed an advantage in their Europa League quarter-final against Lyon at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd chase Watkins, Arsenal consider Saliba sale, Chelsea eye dream transfer: FT Recap
arts.sum: Man Utd chase Watkins, Arsenal consider Saliba sale, Chelsea eye dream transfer: FT Recap Chelsea receive HUGE transfer update over 'best player in the world'

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes lifts lid on Nemanja Matic chat after Andre Onana war of words
arts.sum: Paul Scholes and Nemanja Matic were seen in conversation before Manchester United's clash with Lyon after the Serbian had hammered Andre Onana last week for comments he made

arts.ttl: Team News: Ruben Amorim confirms Man United XI for season-defining Lyon battle in Europa League
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his Red Devils XI for Thursday's Europa League quarter-final second leg against Lyon at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United receive fresh selection issue as Luke Shaw substituted on
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim gained another selection concern on Thursday night in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes claims Ruben Amorim's style doesn't suit £72m star after his struggles this season
arts.sum: The star has managed one goal since December 12, and endured a 21-game goal drought across three months. Meanwhile, he has bagged eight times in all competitions in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Man Utd & Liverpool lead race for Cherki - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool want Lyon forward Rayan Cherki, Arsenal are targeting Kingsley Coman from Bayern, plus more.

arts.ttl: When did Man Utd last win the Premier League?
arts.sum: However, after so many years at the top of English football with unprecedented success, the departure of Sir Alex Ferguson in 2013 led to a remarkable drop-off in performance, with Man Utd failing to win the English top flight since the Scotsman left his role at the helm. Man Utd have failed to win the Premier League since Ferguson left his role in charge in 2013.
